sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: SV Zulte Waregem has shown mixed results in their last 5 matches, securing only 1 win and suffering 4 losses, though they’ve scored in most games. KVC Westerlo is in a poor run of form, with no wins in their last 5 matches, managing just 2 draws and 3 losses. Westerlo’s inability to secure victories could impact their confidence going into this match.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, KVC Westerlo has had the upper hand, winning 3-1 in their most recent meeting in August 2025 and drawing 1-1 in January 2023. Westerlo’s tendency to score first in these matchups (7 out of 8 times) gives them a historical edge. Both teams have consistently scored in 9 of their last 10 meetings, suggesting a high likelihood of goals on both sides.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: SV Zulte Waregem sits 10th with 26 points, having scored 31 goals but conceded 34, showing defensive vulnerabilities. KVC Westerlo, in 12th with 25 points, has a similar goal tally (29 scored, 33 conceded), indicating both teams struggle defensively. Zulte Waregem’s higher ranking and home advantage could play a slight role, but their lack of clean sheets (9 games) is a concern.

sections.subtitle: Key Players to Watch
sections.text: For Zulte Waregem, Jeppe Erenbjerg stands out with 8 goals this season, ranking 2nd in the league, and could be a major threat. Westerlo’s Nacho Ferri, with 6 goals, and Josimar Alcócer, who shone in their last head-to-head with an 8.4 rating, are players to watch. Their impact could decide the outcome in a closely contested match.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: With Sofascore predicting a near-even split (38% home win, 25% draw, 37% away win), this match appears tight. Given Westerlo’s winless streak and Zulte Waregem’s home advantage, the hosts might edge it, but both teams’ defensive frailties suggest a high-scoring game. Historical trends also point to both teams scoring.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: At half-time, KVC Westerlo leads SV Zulte Waregem by a score of 1-0 at the Elindus Arena. The away side took the lead in the 18th minute through a headed goal by Nacho Ferri. Despite being behind, Zulte Waregem showed determination in their play, while Westerlo capitalized on their opportunity to take the advantage.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance comparison
halftimeSections.text: Westerlo has held a slight edge in ball possession and demonstrated efficiency in front of goal, converting one of their big chances. Their defensive structure has been solid, winning a higher percentage of duels compared to Zulte Waregem. On the other hand, Zulte Waregem has been more active in the final third with a greater number of entries and penalty area touches, but they missed a crucial big chance that could have leveled the score. Their duel-winning stats suggest they’ve struggled to impose themselves physically.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw fluctuating attacking momentum between the two sides. Initially, Westerlo started with intent, pushing forward in the early minutes before Zulte Waregem took control with several attacking spells around the first quarter of the half. However, momentum shifted back to Westerlo leading up to their goal, with sustained pressure in the minutes before and after scoring. Towards the latter stages of the half, Zulte Waregem regained the initiative with a series of attacking waves, showing urgency to equalize before the break.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players at half-time
halftimeSections.text: For Westerlo, Nacho Ferri has been the standout performer, not only for his goal but for his constant threat in the attacking third. Dylan Ourega also played a pivotal role with an assist, proving to be a creative force. On Zulte Waregem's side, Anosike Ementa has been a focal point in attack, though he missed a big chance, while Jeppe Erenbjerg showed promise with a key role in creating opportunities. Both teams have players capable of turning the game in the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Areas for improvement
halftimeSections.text: Zulte Waregem needs to improve their finishing in the second half, as missing big chances could prove costly against a side like Westerlo, who have shown clinical edge. They must also work on winning more duels to gain control of the midfield battle. For Westerlo, maintaining their defensive solidity while seeking to exploit spaces on the counter could be key. They will need to be wary of Zulte Waregem’s increasing pressure in the final third, which could lead to a more open game after the break.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: The second half is likely to see Zulte Waregem push hard for an equalizer, given their persistent entries into the final third in the first half. Westerlo, with their lead, might adopt a more cautious approach but will look to capitalize on any defensive lapses from the home side. Expect a competitive half with chances at both ends, as Zulte Waregem’s urgency could either lead to a comeback or expose them to a decisive counterattack from Westerlo.
